S.FORM: == Kakiharan rikec no Taywan == "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" (Inkiris: Taiwan Relations Act, pakisot TRA) o i laloma'ay a rikec no Amilika. I 1979 miheca pikaykian no Amilika kitakit a mitelek to nia rikec ta mipangangan ko congtong ta miteka to romi'ad, o kakiharan rikec no Taywan o todong no Amilika ato Taywan to kalawidang kakiharan, micoker to Taywan ato Korea ato roma mapapolongay kitakit ko kasasikedec a kakomod to kaciwidang a tadamaanay rikec . O Amilika ato roma kitakit, roma kitakit a sifo ano eca o kasasicofel ano eca o nidemakan a maamaan ano eca kasasicalayan, malecad i finawlan no Taywan, o kakiharan rikec no Taywan o patodong no Amilika to kasasicofel lekakawa no Amilika parana'an ko nian . Paikoran Nai 1978 miheca miteka, o Conghuarenmin kapolongan kitakit sifo pakayni i "cecayay calay" kalaloodan, o saki Amilika, Kanata ato Europe kapolongan mico'ay to Solien , nai 1979 miheca ato Amilika masasipatireng to kalali'ay no kitakit. Saka palasawad ko Amilika to kasasitena' no Congkuo ato Amilika a telek, miliyas to sofitay i Taywan itiya, o todong pipadama no sofitay no Amilika (USTDC) i Taywan i 1979 miheca 4 folad 25 romi'ad a masedef itiya. Pakadademaken no Conghuaminko sifo ko itiraay i Amilika a masasowalay kapot i kalomaocan no kitakit, saka ranikay sakapidama no Amilika to i Taywanay a sakarihaday, saka'aloman no Taywan mi'ang'ang to iing no kalomaocan to piliyang to misatekeday kyosanto, oya malacecayay milood i saka tosa kalaloodan a likisi, o picingcing no Congko kyosanto to sakisalongoc ato sapakonira no mitooray a demak . Kararemay pikaykian a iing ci Bailey Goldward ato Amilika a kalomaocan romaroma iing hinapec to congtong ci Carter sateked sa mipalasawad to kapolongan mitena' telek a sakowan no Congko ato Amilika a kalacecayan, orasaka to nian a katatelekan o nano kalomaocan a kararemay pikaykian a iing no Amilika a mihaydaan a tatelek, ci Goldwater miliyang to ni Carter, mifelih kao kararemay pikaykian ko mamihai ta mapalasawad ko nia telekan, mata'elifay ko todong a demak ni Carter congtong. Onini a analal mapatayra i satakaraway a hoyin ko pisapinang ono sician a laloma'an, nika o kararemay pikaykian caay pipatoor to sapifelih caay hananay to kiharen. O nia analal nai ikoran kaketonan no Amilika ato Conghuaminko, o pikaykian no Fafa'eday Kararemay pikaykian a mihaydaan, i 1979 miheca nai ci Jimmy carter congtong ko mitiliday. Pikaykian caay pilayap to Kowoyin to i 'ayaway nipasadakan a "sakapolongan a rikec" a nisilsilan tilid, caira sa ko misilsilay to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" a tilidan, na itiya i 1979 mihecaan pado'edo a citodong. Ni Carter sifo mitilid to nian a "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan", o sapidama to kalali'acaan, ponka, ato kasacofel no caay ko no kalatapangan ko pipatireng a kasasinga'ay, midotoc to Colombia sa'etal rikecan ko pipatirengan to caayay ko kalali'acaan a hocin, oya Amilika itiniay i Taywan a yofayof - o so'elinay no sifo a dayhiw, away ko patodong to kacacofelan a demak. o nia analal nai 1979 miheca 1 folad 1 romi'ad misatapang. Pa'ayaw Patonekan to Taywan O nia rekec o saki "Taywan sakowan" sanay a mikowanay to Taywan (Conghuaminko) ato cimaay mikotayay mikowan a citodongay. "Taywan" a patonekan o nia kanatay a Taywan ato Penho kanatal, caay ka citodong ko Kinmon, Macu a kanatal. Sa'elinay kakiharen a kacacofelan a demak O nian a rikec mahayda patodong sakowan to cecay mikowanay Amilika ato Taywan a "Sa'elinay kakiharen a kacacofelan a demak", mi'eses, ano eca o pipaterep, o Conghuaminko ato Amilika i 'ayaw no 1979 miheca malaheci i kasakitakit a katatelekan ato mitelekan kacidepoc. Dengan o kalasawad no nia katatelek oya "o kapolongan mitena' telek a sakowan no Congko ato Amilika". O nian a rikec madotoc, "Kanikawan ko kacacofelan a demak ano eca pihayda caay ko fiyol ko rikec no Amilika to saki todong i Taywan, no Amilika a rikec o papadoedo to sakacitodong i Taywan, matiya 'ayaway i 1979 miheca 1 folad 1 romi'ad, rikec no Amilika sakacitodong i Taywan. Sofitay a nitelekan "Pasayra ko Amilika i Taywan padamso to todong no sapitena' a dafongan ato kicik sadama, saka ira no Taywan a midama a 'icel no niyah." O sapipatodong i Taywan padamso to todong no sapitena' a dafongan ato kicik sadama a kasahirahiraan o congtong ato pikaykian no kitakit ko miketonay. O nian a rikec patongal to telek, o maanan a caayay ko rihadayay (halo pilalang ano eca pifoot a micolo') ko piposang to ikoray no Taywan i, saheto o patalaway to sakangaay ato alaneng, mangalef ko patodong no Amilika. O nia rikec o pingitangit to Amilika to cecay halaka "Pasayra i Taywan padamso to sapitena' a salood", o "Marariday a 'icel, sapitena' to masamaamaanay a sapiri'ang, ano eca midemak to milepiay a sapiri'ang, malo katalawan no finawlan no Taywan to saka cialaneng ato no syakay kicay telak a demakan." Matiratira ko Conghua renmin kapolongan a sifo mingitangit to Amilika sifo midotoc to caayay ko salaloma'an a patedoay a Amilika Congko toloay kongpaw ato cecayay Congkuo no Conghua renmin kapolongan a pisilsil, nikawrira to kasarekad no Amilika sifo midotoc nia rikec ato enemay toris nipihayda pa'aca to sakalalood i Taywan. I 2001 miheca 4 folad, oya congtong mimingay Bush mihapiw midama ko Amilika to Taywan. Saka tosa miheca, pasowal haca cingra "Mangodo kako to nia rikec 'Kakiharan rikec no Taywan'". O pidotocan no nia telak ano makari'ang ko Taywan, padangen niyam a midipot." Malo pidotocan ko nia rikec pakayraan a midama to Taywan :34. Paca'or ato paliyaw midayaday Pasinting ko Conghua renmin kapolongan ato saka tolo hekal a kitakit, caay kalekapot to Amilika ato Soviet Union (Solien), mikihatiya to caay kalaklak ko heneng ato masamaanay a onto, saka nga'ay a mipespes to romaroma a kitakit. I 1982 miheca 8 folad 17 romi'ad a kongpaw, mihayda ko Amilika milowan pa'aca to sakalalood i Taywan. Nikawrira saki 1982 miheca pacecay to "Enemay toris nipihaydaan" salongan i Conghuaminko, caay pileko mihayda to Conghua renmin kapolongan to salongoc pikowan no Taywan, pasetek haca to salaloma'an no kongpaw a pipa'aca to sakalalood minengneng to kasasisiwtoc no lawac no Taywan ko patodongan a nihadaan. Ikoray no 1990 mihecaan, pikaykian no Amilika mihayda to cecay toris miketon to sapifo'ot, mi'eses to Taywan ato Amilika kasasitodong nai "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" ko kasasingodo. Amilika pikaykian miliyaw pacecay to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" a katadamaan. Mikingkiway a padama i pikaykian no Amilika i 2007 miheca 7 folad a cecay ratoh pahapinang, no Amilika a halaka caay pihayda to Conghua renmin kapolongan to salongoc pikowan to Taywan. O Conghua renmin kapolongan to saki "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" a nengneng "Awaay ko todong no Amilika mikihar to salaloma'an no Congko" sanay. Tona Amilika midotoc to saki padamso to sakalalood no Taywan, caay pitolas miliyang ko Conghua renmin kapolongan. I 2016 miheca 5 folad 19 romi'ad, i 'ayaw ni Tsai Ing-wen patireng to saka 14 rekad a congtong no Conghuaminko i, o fafa'eday pikaykian to kacacofelan a demak wiyinhuy a wiyin, o fafa'eday pikaykian citodongay misolap a wiyinhuy wiyin ci Marco Rubio ato fafa'eday pikaykian kacacofelan a demak wiyinhuy 'ayaway kakeridan, fafa'eday pikaykian calay no Taywan kapolongan kakeridan ci Robert Menendez mapapolong to pasadak to miketonan sowal, miliyaw pacecay to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" ato "Enemay toris nipihaydaan" o parana'an no Amilika Taywan a patodongan. O Amilika a kapolongan kasarekad i 2016 miheca a polong no kitakit a dayhiw daykay pasadak to sowal: "O kacitodongan no mita midoedo pakayni i "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" a telek, mihayda kita to ni Reagan congtong itini i 1982 mihecaan a panan enemay nihadaan to Taywan. Miliyang kita to maanan sapitekedan midemak mifalic to kanga'ayan no lilis no Taywan: Pakayni ikoraay no Tayan a kacalemceman a demak o papakaynien i rihadayay ko kasasowal a misalof, mihayda ko finawlan no Taywan; ano Congko sapifelihan to matiniay a telak, o Amilika pakayni i "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan", mipadang to Taywan a mitena'… o tadawidang no Amilika, o ngaayay saicelen no mita micoker ko Taywan, halo pakoniyah a lali'aca katatelek a kacitodong, mitakop pa'aca halo misangaan no kasoling a micelemay a kicik a sapitena a sakalalood…." I 2021 miheca 11 folad 17 romi'ad, o congtong no Amilika kitakit alaneng demakan micokeray ci Anne Neuberger pasowal sa, midotoc to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan", Amilika sifo o mamipadamso to sapicoker sapitena' no Taywan. Ono Congko a kacacofelan a demak paratohay ci Zhao Lijian sowal sa, o "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" mifelihay to cecayay Congko a todong ato Congko Amilika toloay kapolongan kongpaw, o awaayay todong no saki rikec. I 2023 miheca 2 folad 22 romi'ad, no Russia a tapang a mitiya ci Radio Sputnik itiniay i Amilika Washington mipahoso to mitiya tamdaw ci Garland Nixon sowal sa "Ci Biden i kaitiraan paini ato mitekop to Taywan a halaka", pakayni to nian itini i Taywan a yofayof no Amilika pasowalay tamdaw "40 no mihecaan, o Amilika to saki "cecay congko a halaka" oya to pakayni i "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan", "Toloay kapolongan kongpaw" ato "Enemay nihadaan to Taywan" ko pi'esesan." Paini sa "Ci Biden congtong na o mala fafa'eday a pikaykian a iing itiya micokeray ko paya ningra to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan", pado'edo tanektek ko pi'imer to nia todong, halo Amilika pado'edo midama to Taywan sakaedeng a 'icel mitena', o Amilika kai masamaanay caay ko rihadayay ko sapiketon to ikor no Taywan a 'icel, o nengneng to ka'etipay Taypinyang sakarihaday ato alaneng a katalawan, o tatakaraw ko sapisida'it", paini haca "O papado'edo ko Amilika marocekay pa'icel, miferet to masamaamaanay maedengay sapiri'ang to sakanga'ay no finawlan no Amilika, syakay, kicay katatelek a 'icel, ano eca roma a sapatalaw.", pa'icel "O pihayda no Amilika to Taywan matiya o 'ongcoy ko tanektek no parana'an, saka cidama no lilis no riyar i Taywan ato sa'etal a saka rihaday ato katanektek. O papado'edo ko Amilika micoker to rihadayay sapisalof ko tosaaay sahetal a kacalemceman, onini i o matatodongay i nafaloco'an no fnawlan no Tayan a satadamaanay a sakaira." Roma kitakit a "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan". Dipong, i Dipong ira ko pikaykian a iing misakapot ato 'icel no finawlan i hatiniay to a mihecaan micoker micikeroh mitelek to no Dipongay a "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan". I 2021 miheca no Dipong a mikowanay a kasarekad Cemintang a kacacofelan a demak "Taywan analal sakapot", ira ko iing misaakoay milecad to no Amilika pasetek to no Dipong a rikec. Europe lekatep, ira ko no Taywan hakasi mikeroh to kasasowal pasadak to no Europe lekatep a tilid to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan". Russia: "Kakiharan a rikec no Russia ato Taywan": I 1992 miheca pakayni i kitakit Duma mihayda, congtong ci Yeltsin ko mitiliday. Salaloma'an micoker to cecayay ko Congko a todong, o Russia lekatep caay picoker to no mikowanay no Taywan, sifoan a todongan. Pinengnengan Pahecian Pakayraan matisil: 2.黃婉婷. (PDF). (PDF)於2024-02-21). 然而, .
S.PHON: == kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan == "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan" (inkiris: taiwan rəɾatio~uns aʦt, pakiso~ut tra) o~u i ɾaɾo~umaʡaj a rikəʦ no~u amiɾika. i **** miħəʦa pikajkian no~u amiɾika kitakit a mitəɾək to~u nia rikəʦ ta mipaŋaŋan ko~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ta mitəka to~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u amiɾika ato~u tajwan to~u kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ kakiħaran, miʦo~ukər to~u tajwan ato~u ko~urəa ato~u ro~uma mapapo~uɾo~uŋaj kitakit ko~u kasasikəɬ~ɮəʦ a kako~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u kaʦiwiɬ~ɮaŋ a taɬ~ɮamaanaj rikəʦ . o~u amiɾika ato~u ro~uma kitakit, ro~uma kitakit a sifo~u ano~u əʦa o~u kasasiʦo~ufəɾ ano~u əʦa o~u niɬ~ɮəmakan a maamaan ano~u əʦa kasasiʦaɾajan, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ i finawɾan no~u tajwan, o~u kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan o~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u amiɾika to~u kasasiʦo~ufəɾ ɾəkakawa no~u amiɾika paranaʡan ko~u nian . paiko~uran nai **** miħəʦa mitəka, o~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uarənmin kapo~uɾo~uŋan kitakit sifo~u pakajni i "ʦəʦajaj ʦaɾaj" kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan, o~u saki amiɾika, kanata ato~u əo~u~uro~upə kapo~uɾo~uŋan miʦo~uʡaj to~u so~uɾiən , nai **** miħəʦa ato~u amiɾika masasipatirəŋ to~u kaɾaɾiʡaj no~u kitakit. saka paɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u amiɾika to~u kasasitənaʡ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u~uo~u ato~u amiɾika a təɾək, miɾijas to~u so~ufitaj i tajwan itija, o~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ pipaɬ~ɮama no~u so~ufitaj no~u amiɾika (o~u~ustɬ~ɮʦ) i tajwan i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a masəɬ~ɮəf itija. pakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u sifo~u ko~u itiraaj i amiɾika a masaso~uwaɾaj kapo~ut i kaɾo~umao~uʦan no~u kitakit, saka ranikaj sakapiɬ~ɮama no~u amiɾika to~u i tajwanaj a sakariħaɬ~ɮaj, sakaʡaɾo~uman no~u tajwan miʡaŋʡaŋ to~u iiŋ no~u kaɾo~umao~uʦan to~u piɾijaŋ to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj kjo~usanto~u, o~uja maɾaʦəʦajaj miɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i saka to~usa kaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮan a ɾikisi, o~u piʦiŋʦiŋ no~u ʦo~uŋko~u kjo~usanto~u to~u sakisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ ato~u sapako~unira no~u mito~uo~uraj a ɬ~ɮəmak . kararəmaj pikajkian a iiŋ ʦi b~b~vaiɾəj *o~uɾɬ~ɮwarɬ~ɮ ato~u amiɾika a kaɾo~umao~uʦan ro~umaro~uma iiŋ ħinapəʦ to~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ʦartər satəkəɬ~ɮ sa mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan mitənaʡ təɾək a sako~uwan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ato~u amiɾika a kaɾaʦəʦajan, o~urasaka to~u nian a katatəɾəkan o~u nano~u kaɾo~umao~uʦan a kararəmaj pikajkian a iiŋ no~u amiɾika a miħajɬ~ɮaan a tatəɾək, ʦi *o~uɾɬ~ɮwatər miɾijaŋ to~u ni ʦartər, mifəɾiħ kao~u kararəmaj pikajkian ko~u mamiħai ta mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ ko~u nia təɾəkan, mataʡəɾifaj ko~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak ni ʦartər ʦo~uŋto~uŋ. o~unini a anaɾaɾ mapatajra i satakarawaj a ħo~ujin ko~u pisapinaŋ o~uno~u siʦian a ɾaɾo~umaʡan, nika o~u kararəmaj pikajkian ʦaaj pipato~uo~ur to~u sapifəɾiħ ʦaaj ħananaj to~u kiħarən. o~u nia anaɾaɾ nai iko~uran kakəto~unan no~u amiɾika ato~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u, o~u pikajkian no~u fafaʡəɬ~ɮaj kararəmaj pikajkian a miħajɬ~ɮaan, i **** miħəʦa nai ʦi *immj ʦartər ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj. pikajkian ʦaaj piɾajap to~u ko~uwo~ujin to~u i ʡajawaj nipasaɬ~ɮakan a "sakapo~uɾo~uŋan a rikəʦ" a nisiɾsiɾan tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ʦaira sa ko~u misiɾsiɾaj to~u "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan" a tiɾiɬ~ɮan, na itija i **** miħəʦaan paɬ~ɮo~uʡəɬ~ɮo~u a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ. ni ʦartər sifo~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u nian a "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan", o~u sapiɬ~ɮama to~u kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan, po~unka, ato~u kasaʦo~ufəɾ no~u ʦaaj ko~u no~u kaɾatapaŋan ko~u pipatirəŋ a kasasiŋaʡaj, miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ʦo~uɾo~umb~b~via saʡətaɾ rikəʦan ko~u pipatirəŋan to~u ʦaajaj ko~u kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan a ħo~uʦin, o~uja amiɾika itiniaj i tajwan a jo~ufajo~uf - o~u so~uʡəɾinaj no~u sifo~u a ɬ~ɮajħiw, awaj ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak. o~u nia anaɾaɾ nai **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ misatapaŋ. paʡajaw pato~unəkan to~u tajwan o~u nia rəkəʦ o~u saki "tajwan sako~uwan" sanaj a miko~uwanaj to~u tajwan (ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u) ato~u ʦimaaj miko~utajaj miko~uwan a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj. "tajwan" a pato~unəkan o~u nia kanataj a tajwan ato~u pənħo~u kanataɾ, ʦaaj ka ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ ko~u kinmo~un, maʦo~u~u a kanataɾ. saʡəɾinaj kakiħarən a kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u nian a rikəʦ maħajɬ~ɮa pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ sako~uwan to~u ʦəʦaj miko~uwanaj amiɾika ato~u tajwan a "saʡəɾinaj kakiħarən a kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak", miʡəsəs, ano~u əʦa o~u pipatərəp, o~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u ato~u amiɾika i ʡajaw no~u **** miħəʦa maɾaħəʦi i kasakitakit a katatəɾəkan ato~u mitəɾəkan kaʦiɬ~ɮəpo~uʦ. ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u kaɾasawaɬ~ɮ no~u nia katatəɾək o~uja "o~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan mitənaʡ təɾək a sako~uwan no~u ʦo~uŋko~u ato~u amiɾika". o~u nian a rikəʦ maɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ, "kanikawan ko~u kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak ano~u əʦa piħajɬ~ɮa ʦaaj ko~u fijo~uɾ ko~u rikəʦ no~u amiɾika to~u saki to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i tajwan, no~u amiɾika a rikəʦ o~u papaɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u sakaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i tajwan, matija ʡajawaj i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, rikəʦ no~u amiɾika sakaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i tajwan. so~ufitaj a nitəɾəkan "pasajra ko~u amiɾika i tajwan paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u sapitənaʡ a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋan ato~u kiʦik saɬ~ɮama, saka ira no~u tajwan a miɬ~ɮama a ʡiʦəɾ no~u nijaħ." o~u sapipato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ i tajwan paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u sapitənaʡ a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋan ato~u kiʦik saɬ~ɮama a kasaħiraħiraan o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ato~u pikajkian no~u kitakit ko~u mikəto~unaj. o~u nian a rikəʦ pato~uŋaɾ to~u təɾək, o~u maanan a ʦaajaj ko~u riħaɬ~ɮajaj (ħaɾo~u piɾaɾaŋ ano~u əʦa pifo~uo~ut a miʦo~uɾo~uʡ) ko~u pipo~usaŋ to~u iko~uraj no~u tajwan i, saħəto~u o~u pataɾawaj to~u sakaŋaaj ato~u aɾanəŋ, maŋaɾəf ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ no~u amiɾika. o~u nia rikəʦ o~u piŋitaŋit to~u amiɾika to~u ʦəʦaj ħaɾaka "pasajra i tajwan paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u sapitənaʡ a saɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ", o~u "marariɬ~ɮaj a ʡiʦəɾ, sapitənaʡ to~u masamaamaanaj a sapiriʡaŋ, ano~u əʦa miɬ~ɮəmak to~u miɾəpiaj a sapiriʡaŋ, maɾo~u kataɾawan no~u finawɾan no~u tajwan to~u saka ʦiaɾanəŋ ato~u no~u sjakaj kiʦaj təɾak a ɬ~ɮəmakan." matiratira ko~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua rənmin kapo~uɾo~uŋan a sifo~u miŋitaŋit to~u amiɾika sifo~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ʦaajaj ko~u saɾaɾo~umaʡan a patəɬ~ɮo~uaj a amiɾika ʦo~uŋko~u to~uɾo~uaj ko~uŋpaw ato~u ʦəʦajaj ʦo~uŋko~u~uo~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua rənmin kapo~uɾo~uŋan a pisiɾsiɾ, nikawrira to~u kasarəkaɬ~ɮ no~u amiɾika sifo~u miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ nia rikəʦ ato~u ənəmaj to~uris nipiħajɬ~ɮa paʡaʦa to~u sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i tajwan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, o~uja ʦo~uŋto~uŋ mimiŋaj b~b~vo~u~usħ miħapiw miɬ~ɮama ko~u amiɾika to~u tajwan. saka to~usa miħəʦa, paso~uwaɾ ħaʦa ʦiŋra "maŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u kako~u to~u nia rikəʦ ʡkakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwanʡ". o~u piɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦan no~u nia təɾak ano~u makariʡaŋ ko~u tajwan, paɬ~ɮaŋən nijam a miɬ~ɮipo~ut." maɾo~u piɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦan ko~u nia rikəʦ pakajraan a miɬ~ɮama to~u tajwan :**. paʦaʡo~ur ato~u paɾijaw sakaɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ i tajwan. nikawrira saki **** miħəʦa paʦəʦaj to~u "ənəmaj to~uris nipiħajɬ~ɮaan" saɾo~uŋan i ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u, ʦaaj piɾəko~u miħajɬ~ɮa to~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~ua rənmin kapo~uɾo~uŋan to~u amiɾika maro~uʦəkaj paʡiʦəɾ, mifərət to~u masamaamaanaj maəɬ~ɮəŋaj sapiriʡaŋ to~u sakaŋaʡaj no~u finawɾan no~u amiɾika, sjakaj, kiʦaj katatəɾək a ʡiʦəɾ, ano~u əʦa ro~uma a sapataɾaw.", paʡiʦəɾ "o~u piħajɬ~ɮa no~u amiɾika to~u tajwan matija o~u ʡo~uŋʦo~uj ko~u tanəktək no~u paranaʡan, saka ʦiɬ~ɮama no~u ɾiɾis no~u rijar i tajwan ato~u saʡətaɾ a saka riħaɬ~ɮaj ato~u katanəktək. o~u a sakaira." ro~uma kitakit a "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan". ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ, i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ira ko~u pikajkian a iiŋ misakapo~ut ato~u ʡiʦəɾ no~u finawɾan i ħatiniaj to~u a miħəʦaan miʦo~ukər miʦikəro~uħ mitəɾək to~u no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋaj a "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan". i **** miħəʦa no~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a miko~uwanaj a kasarəkaɬ~ɮ ʦəmintaŋ a kaʦaʦo~ufəɾan a ɬ~ɮəmak "tajwan anaɾaɾ sakapo~ut", ira ko~u iiŋ tiɾiɬ~ɮ to~u "kakiħaran rikəʦ no~u tajwan". ro~u~ussia: "kakiħaran a rikəʦ no~u ro~u~ussia ato~u tajwan": i **** miħəʦa pakajni i kitakit ɬ~ɮo~u~uma miħajɬ~ɮa, ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi jəɾtsin ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj. saɾaɾo~umaʡan miʦo~ukər to~u ʦəʦajaj ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, o~u ro~u~ussia ɾəkatəp ʦaaj piʦo~ukər to~u no~u miko~uwanaj no~u tajwan, sifo~uan a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan. pinəŋnəŋan paħəʦian pakajraan S.FORM: == Kakiharan rikec no Taywan == "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" (Inkiris: Taiwan Relations Act, pakisot TRA) o i laloma'ay a rikec no Amilika. I 1979 miheca pikaykian no Amilika kitakit a mitelek to nia rikec ta mipangangan ko congtong ta miteka to romi'ad, o kakiharan rikec no Taywan o todong no Amilika ato Taywan to kalawidang kakiharan, micoker to Taywan ato Korea ato roma mapapolongay kitakit ko kasasikedec a kakomod to kaciwidang a tadamaanay rikec . O Amilika ato roma kitakit, roma kitakit a sifo ano eca o kasasicofel ano eca o nidemakan a maamaan ano eca kasasicalayan, malecad i finawlan no Taywan, o kakiharan rikec no Taywan o patodong no Amilika to kasasicofel lekakawa no Amilika parana'an ko nian . Paikoran Nai 1978 miheca miteka, o Conghuarenmin kapolongan kitakit sifo pakayni i "cecayay calay" kalaloodan, o saki Amilika, Kanata ato Europe kapolongan mico'ay to Solien , nai 1979 miheca ato Amilika masasipatireng to kalali'ay no kitakit. Saka palasawad ko Amilika to kasasitena' no Congkuo ato Amilika a telek, miliyas to sofitay i Taywan itiya, o todong pipadama no sofitay no Amilika (USTDC) i Taywan i 1979 miheca 4 folad 25 romi'ad a masedef itiya. Pakadademaken no Conghuaminko sifo ko itiraay i Amilika a masasowalay kapot i kalomaocan no kitakit, saka ranikay sakapidama no Amilika to i Taywanay a sakarihaday, saka'aloman no Taywan mi'ang'ang to iing no kalomaocan to piliyang to misatekeday kyosanto, oya malacecayay milood i saka tosa kalaloodan a likisi, o picingcing no Congko kyosanto to sakisalongoc ato sapakonira no mitooray a demak . Kararemay pikaykian a iing ci Bailey Goldward ato Amilika a kalomaocan romaroma iing hinapec to congtong ci Carter sateked sa mipalasawad to kapolongan mitena' telek a sakowan no Congko ato Amilika a kalacecayan, orasaka to nian a katatelekan o nano kalomaocan a kararemay pikaykian a iing no Amilika a mihaydaan a tatelek, ci Goldwater miliyang to ni Carter, mifelih kao kararemay pikaykian ko mamihai ta mapalasawad ko nia telekan, mata'elifay ko todong a demak ni Carter congtong. Onini a analal mapatayra i satakaraway a hoyin ko pisapinang ono sician a laloma'an, nika o kararemay pikaykian caay pipatoor to sapifelih caay hananay to kiharen. O nia analal nai ikoran kaketonan no Amilika ato Conghuaminko, o pikaykian no Fafa'eday Kararemay pikaykian a mihaydaan, i 1979 miheca nai ci Jimmy carter congtong ko mitiliday. Pikaykian caay pilayap to Kowoyin to i 'ayaway nipasadakan a "sakapolongan a rikec" a nisilsilan tilid, caira sa ko misilsilay to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" a tilidan, na itiya i 1979 mihecaan pado'edo a citodong. Ni Carter sifo mitilid to nian a "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan", o sapidama to kalali'acaan, ponka, ato kasacofel no caay ko no kalatapangan ko pipatireng a kasasinga'ay, midotoc to Colombia sa'etal rikecan ko pipatirengan to caayay ko kalali'acaan a hocin, oya Amilika itiniay i Taywan a yofayof - o so'elinay no sifo a dayhiw, away ko patodong to kacacofelan a demak. o nia analal nai 1979 miheca 1 folad 1 romi'ad misatapang. Pa'ayaw Patonekan to Taywan O nia rekec o saki "Taywan sakowan" sanay a mikowanay to Taywan (Conghuaminko) ato cimaay mikotayay mikowan a citodongay. "Taywan" a patonekan o nia kanatay a Taywan ato Penho kanatal, caay ka citodong ko Kinmon, Macu a kanatal. Sa'elinay kakiharen a kacacofelan a demak O nian a rikec mahayda patodong sakowan to cecay mikowanay Amilika ato Taywan a "Sa'elinay kakiharen a kacacofelan a demak", mi'eses, ano eca o pipaterep, o Conghuaminko ato Amilika i 'ayaw no 1979 miheca malaheci i kasakitakit a katatelekan ato mitelekan kacidepoc. Dengan o kalasawad no nia katatelek oya "o kapolongan mitena' telek a sakowan no Congko ato Amilika". O nian a rikec madotoc, "Kanikawan ko kacacofelan a demak ano eca pihayda caay ko fiyol ko rikec no Amilika to saki todong i Taywan, no Amilika a rikec o papadoedo to sakacitodong i Taywan, matiya 'ayaway i 1979 miheca 1 folad 1 romi'ad, rikec no Amilika sakacitodong i Taywan. Sofitay a nitelekan "Pasayra ko Amilika i Taywan padamso to todong no sapitena' a dafongan ato kicik sadama, saka ira no Taywan a midama a 'icel no niyah." O sapipatodong i Taywan padamso to todong no sapitena' a dafongan ato kicik sadama a kasahirahiraan o congtong ato pikaykian no kitakit ko miketonay. O nian a rikec patongal to telek, o maanan a caayay ko rihadayay (halo pilalang ano eca pifoot a micolo') ko piposang to ikoray no Taywan i, saheto o patalaway to sakangaay ato alaneng, mangalef ko patodong no Amilika. O nia rikec o pingitangit to Amilika to cecay halaka "Pasayra i Taywan padamso to sapitena' a salood", o "Marariday a 'icel, sapitena' to masamaamaanay a sapiri'ang, ano eca midemak to milepiay a sapiri'ang, malo katalawan no finawlan no Taywan to saka cialaneng ato no syakay kicay telak a demakan." Matiratira ko Conghua renmin kapolongan a sifo mingitangit to Amilika sifo midotoc to caayay ko salaloma'an a patedoay a Amilika Congko toloay kongpaw ato cecayay Congkuo no Conghua renmin kapolongan a pisilsil, nikawrira to kasarekad no Amilika sifo midotoc nia rikec ato enemay toris nipihayda pa'aca to sakalalood i Taywan. I 2001 miheca 4 folad, oya congtong mimingay Bush mihapiw midama ko Amilika to Taywan. Saka tosa miheca, pasowal haca cingra "Mangodo kako to nia rikec 'Kakiharan rikec no Taywan'". O pidotocan no nia telak ano makari'ang ko Taywan, padangen niyam a midipot." Malo pidotocan ko nia rikec pakayraan a midama to Taywan :34. Paca'or ato paliyaw midayaday Pasinting ko Conghua renmin kapolongan ato saka tolo hekal a kitakit, caay kalekapot to Amilika ato Soviet Union (Solien), mikihatiya to caay kalaklak ko heneng ato masamaanay a onto, saka nga'ay a mipespes to romaroma a kitakit. I 1982 miheca 8 folad 17 romi'ad a kongpaw, mihayda ko Amilika milowan pa'aca to sakalalood i Taywan. Nikawrira saki 1982 miheca pacecay to "Enemay toris nipihaydaan" salongan i Conghuaminko, caay pileko mihayda to Conghua renmin kapolongan to salongoc pikowan no Taywan, pasetek haca to salaloma'an no kongpaw a pipa'aca to sakalalood minengneng to kasasisiwtoc no lawac no Taywan ko patodongan a nihadaan. Ikoray no 1990 mihecaan, pikaykian no Amilika mihayda to cecay toris miketon to sapifo'ot, mi'eses to Taywan ato Amilika kasasitodong nai "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" ko kasasingodo. Amilika pikaykian miliyaw pacecay to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" a katadamaan. Mikingkiway a padama i pikaykian no Amilika i 2007 miheca 7 folad a cecay ratoh pahapinang, no Amilika a halaka caay pihayda to Conghua renmin kapolongan to salongoc pikowan to Taywan. O Conghua renmin kapolongan to saki "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" a nengneng "Awaay ko todong no Amilika mikihar to salaloma'an no Congko" sanay. Tona Amilika midotoc to saki padamso to sakalalood no Taywan, caay pitolas miliyang ko Conghua renmin kapolongan. I 2016 miheca 5 folad 19 romi'ad, i 'ayaw ni Tsai Ing-wen patireng to saka 14 rekad a congtong no Conghuaminko i, o fafa'eday pikaykian to kacacofelan a demak wiyinhuy a wiyin, o fafa'eday pikaykian citodongay misolap a wiyinhuy wiyin ci Marco Rubio ato fafa'eday pikaykian kacacofelan a demak wiyinhuy 'ayaway kakeridan, fafa'eday pikaykian calay no Taywan kapolongan kakeridan ci Robert Menendez mapapolong to pasadak to miketonan sowal, miliyaw pacecay to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" ato "Enemay toris nipihaydaan" o parana'an no Amilika Taywan a patodongan. O Amilika a kapolongan kasarekad i 2016 miheca a polong no kitakit a dayhiw daykay pasadak to sowal: "O kacitodongan no mita midoedo pakayni i "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" a telek, mihayda kita to ni Reagan congtong itini i 1982 mihecaan a panan enemay nihadaan to Taywan. Miliyang kita to maanan sapitekedan midemak mifalic to kanga'ayan no lilis no Taywan: Pakayni ikoraay no Tayan a kacalemceman a demak o papakaynien i rihadayay ko kasasowal a misalof, mihayda ko finawlan no Taywan; ano Congko sapifelihan to matiniay a telak, o Amilika pakayni i "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan", mipadang to Taywan a mitena'… o tadawidang no Amilika, o ngaayay saicelen no mita micoker ko Taywan, halo pakoniyah a lali'aca katatelek a kacitodong, mitakop pa'aca halo misangaan no kasoling a micelemay a kicik a sapitena a sakalalood…." I 2021 miheca 11 folad 17 romi'ad, o congtong no Amilika kitakit alaneng demakan micokeray ci Anne Neuberger pasowal sa, midotoc to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan", Amilika sifo o mamipadamso to sapicoker sapitena' no Taywan. Ono Congko a kacacofelan a demak paratohay ci Zhao Lijian sowal sa, o "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan" mifelihay to cecayay Congko a todong ato Congko Amilika toloay kapolongan kongpaw, o awaayay todong no saki rikec. I 2023 miheca 2 folad 22 romi'ad, no Russia a tapang a mitiya ci Radio Sputnik itiniay i Amilika Washington mipahoso to mitiya tamdaw ci Garland Nixon sowal sa "Ci Biden i kaitiraan paini ato mitekop to Taywan a halaka", pakayni to nian itini i Taywan a yofayof no Amilika pasowalay tamdaw "40 no mihecaan, o Amilika to saki "cecay congko a halaka" oya to pakayni i "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan", "Toloay kapolongan kongpaw" ato "Enemay nihadaan to Taywan" ko pi'esesan." Paini sa "Ci Biden congtong na o mala fafa'eday a pikaykian a iing itiya micokeray ko paya ningra to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan", pado'edo tanektek ko pi'imer to nia todong, halo Amilika pado'edo midama to Taywan sakaedeng a 'icel mitena', o Amilika kai masamaanay caay ko rihadayay ko sapiketon to ikor no Taywan a 'icel, o nengneng to ka'etipay Taypinyang sakarihaday ato alaneng a katalawan, o tatakaraw ko sapisida'it", paini haca "O papado'edo ko Amilika marocekay pa'icel, miferet to masamaamaanay maedengay sapiri'ang to sakanga'ay no finawlan no Amilika, syakay, kicay katatelek a 'icel, ano eca roma a sapatalaw.", pa'icel "O pihayda no Amilika to Taywan matiya o 'ongcoy ko tanektek no parana'an, saka cidama no lilis no riyar i Taywan ato sa'etal a saka rihaday ato katanektek. O papado'edo ko Amilika micoker to rihadayay sapisalof ko tosaaay sahetal a kacalemceman, onini i o matatodongay i nafaloco'an no fnawlan no Tayan a satadamaanay a sakaira." Roma kitakit a "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan". Dipong, i Dipong ira ko pikaykian a iing misakapot ato 'icel no finawlan i hatiniay to a mihecaan micoker micikeroh mitelek to no Dipongay a "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan". I 2021 miheca no Dipong a mikowanay a kasarekad Cemintang a kacacofelan a demak "Taywan analal sakapot", ira ko iing misaakoay milecad to no Amilika pasetek to no Dipong a rikec. Europe lekatep, ira ko no Taywan hakasi mikeroh to kasasowal pasadak to no Europe lekatep a tilid to "Kakiharan rikec no Taywan". Russia: "Kakiharan a rikec no Russia ato Taywan": I 1992 miheca pakayni i kitakit Duma mihayda, congtong ci Yeltsin ko mitiliday. Salaloma'an micoker to cecayay ko Congko a todong, o Russia lekatep caay picoker to no mikowanay no Taywan, sifoan a todongan. Pinengnengan Pahecian Pakayraan matisil: 2.黃婉婷. (PDF). (PDF)於2024-02-21). 然而, .
